---
title: "voice_check.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/voice_check.py"
loc: 30
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.02
style_score: 3.88
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.61
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating VoiceDiagnostic, execute.

## Interaction Protocol
Import VoiceDiagnostic and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 21 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.engine.dialogue](file://src.core.engine.dialogue)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `VoiceDiagnostic`
- `execute`
- `main`
